name: sweep_twist_v3_10
_doc: Sweep arch GRADUAL twist (twist_deg) from -30° to +30° in 10 steps, holding everything else fixed at the v3 baseline. Unlike sweep_torsion_v3.json (which rigidly rotates arch+descending and keeps the arch planar in a rotated plane), this gradually twists along the arch — the arch becomes a non-planar 3D curve, and the descending tube ends up rotated by the full twist_deg relative to the inlet plane.
